name: Ubiquitous AI Corporation
summary: Ubiquitous AI Corporation provides software products primarily in Japan. The companys products include Ubiquitous Securus, a secure data management solution using hardware secure IP; Ubiquitous TPM Security, a security software solution; Ubiquitous Network Framework, a network platform for IoT devices; Ubiquitous DTCP, a link protection middleware; Ubiquitous HDCP, a software development kit optimized for HDCP implementation; and Ubiquitous USB host platform. It also offers Ubiquitous WPA/WPS/Wi-Fi Direct, a software development kit for developing the functionalities necessary for wireless LAN clients to acquire the Wi-Fi certification logo; Ubiquitous QuickBoot, a fast boot solution for Linux and Android; and Ubiquitous DeviceSQL, a data management software for embedded systems. The company was formerly known as Ubiquitous Corporation and changed its name to Ubiquitous AI Corporation in July 2018. Ubiquitous AI Corporation founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
